content.body: The following diff might answer your question: https://github.com/tc39/ecma402/pull/1044/changes#diff-aae61752e383a82db0847140fc85c3f1718f6348407153200b6db8462f10a21aR107
Yes, this matches my understanding of the spec text in https://tc39.es/proposal-temporal/#sec-intl-datetimeformat-constructor.
shu The change that you mentioned is step 32c.
